messages.content: When will the next sale be on the Megatron?

We don't currently have a confirmed date for the next sale on the Megatron. However, you can call us at (952) 283-0777 during business hours (Mon-Fri 8:30am-4:30pm CST) to be added to our pre-order list when it arrives.
Do ex military leaders get a discount?
That's something our team will need to review — let me get the right person involved and they'll follow up with you shortly.
